items.name: ANTIRTOS
items.description: Unleash your interrupts with an ultra-fast task manager, delivering tens of thousands of push/pull TPS even on simple MCUs. Whenever the program must wait, useful tasks run instead—eliminating blocking and dummy wait loops. The simplicity matter!
